case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. COLTON FARRIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,062.70 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARRIS, COLTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $46.00 SERVED JUN-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FARRIS, COLTON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 8/8/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARRIS, COLTON $4,062.70 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,108.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2018 BY PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEANNETTE BRYANT, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
